Statements.Statement:
SELECT id AS "Id", name AS "Name", price AS "Price", category AS "Category", stock AS "Stock", created_at AS "CreatedAt" FROM products
LOWER(name) LIKE @Search
category = @Category
price >= @MinPrice
price <= @MaxPrice
stock >= @MinStock
stock <= @MaxStock
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT @Limit OFFSET @Offset;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
LOWER(name) LIKE @Search
category = @Category
price >= @MinPrice
price <= @MaxPrice
stock >= @MinStock
stock <= @MaxStock
SELECT id AS "Id", name AS "Name", price AS "Price", category AS "Category", stock AS "Stock", created_at AS "CreatedAt" FROM products WHERE id = @Id;
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '';

INSERT INTO products(name, price, category, stock, created_at) VALUES(@Name, @Price, @Category, @Stock, NOW()) RETURNING id AS "Id", name AS "Name", price AS "Price", category AS "Category", stock AS "Stock", created_at AS "CreatedAt";

UPDATE products
name = @Name,
price = @Price,
category = @Category,
stock = @Stock,
WHERE id = @Id RETURNING id AS "Id", name AS "Name", price AS "Price", category AS "Category", stock AS "Stock", created_at AS "CreatedAt";
DELETE FROM products WHERE id = @Id RETURNING id AS "Id", name AS "Name", price AS "Price", category AS "Category", stock AS "Stock", created_at AS "CreatedAt";
